name: get_schedule_info
description: Retrieve schedule information by their period name, including period name, person, role, and hours per shift

period_name.description: The period's unique name (e.g., 'Monday Morning', 'Tuesday Evening')

user_prompt.description: The user's prompt (e.g., 'Who is scheduled for Monday Morning')

name: delete_schedule_record
description: Permanently delete a schedule record from the registry by their period name

period_id.description: The period's unique identifier to delete (e.g., 1, 2, 3)

name: search_kitchen_qa
description: Search the Kitchen knowledge base to answer questions about kitchen operations, including closing checklist, prep sheets, recognition methods, etc

query.description: The question or topic to search for (e.g., 'closing checklist', 'prep sheets', 'recognition methods')
